workspaceDock.welcome: Hi {name}, I’m the new BSD-YBM AI layer. We’re on {section}, tailored for {industry}. I can help analyze {documents}, draft tasks, voice replies, and quick access to the scan panel.

errors.aiLayerFailed: The AI layer couldn’t respond right now.
errors.noUsefulReply: No useful answer was returned from the AI.
errors.generic: Something went wrong with the AI layer.

inbox: Summarize what’s urgent to handle today.
Where is the bottleneck in the inbox?

clients.1: Draft a follow‑up for a client who hasn’t replied.
clients.2: Which clients are stuck without a final document?

documents.noTemplate: Which document should we issue now?
documents.2: Check which documents are missing filing.

billing: Which payments are at risk this week?
Where are open documents without collection?
Give me a short cash‑flow snapshot.
operations: Where is operational load highest right now?
Which task should we automate first?
Give me a short throughput status.
settings: What should I reset for my trade?
Check whether my menus fit my trade.
How do I strengthen the AI layer for the team?

default.0: Give me a short business snapshot.
default.2: Prepare a work plan for today.

assistant.title: New AI bubble
assistant.subtitle: Connected to {section} and {industry}.
assistant.thinking: AI is working on a reply...
assistant.placeholder: Write what you need: analysis, drafting, answer, workflow, or starting a process...
assistant.footerHint: Based on the current screen, trade, and your organization data.
assistant.voiceInlineHint: Record or edit — then send to the AI like in chat.

voice.title: Full voice experience
voice.subtitle: Record, transcribe, send to AI, and read replies aloud.
voice.micUnsupported: This browser doesn’t support speech recognition
voice.micReadyHint: Use live recording, edit the transcript, and send straight to AI.
voice.micFallbackHint: You can still paste text manually and use read‑aloud.
voice.autoSendHint: When transcription finishes, it sends immediately to AI.
voice.readRepliesHint: Read the last reply aloud or stop playback.
voice.autoSpeakHint: Auto read replies when a voice command is sent.
voice.liveHint: You can edit text before sending.
voice.voicePlaceholder: Transcript appears here… e.g. open my documents, check what’s urgent, or draft a professional approval.

scanner.title: Advanced scan panel
scanner.subtitle: Synced with {industry}, available from every `/app`, and flows straight to documents and billing.
scanner.needOrgTitle: Scan panel is available after connecting an organization
scanner.needOrgBody: An active organization ID is required to connect scanning to AI, documents, and issuance.

scannerWizard.runHint: Run a scan and wait for it to finish to continue to results.

sectionMeta.clientsSummary: Manage {clients} with a direct link to {documents}.
